rulings.Case Title: GERALD ROBERT RUDY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 24, 2008, line 3. DEFENDANT MAGGIORA BROS. DRILLING, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant shifts the burden of producing evidence based on the Maggiora declaration. Plaintiff presents no further evidence apart from plaintiff's previously cited deposition testimony and as a consequence, fails to present evidence that creates a triable issue of fact. =(302/PJM/PB)
